content.en:
Guheng Mountain.

Stygian Mountain.

This is also one of the many treasure mountains of Guheng Mountain, and Ye Tian was arranged here.

He could build a palace here and use an area of the area as a dojo.

In addition to him, there are several patrol envoys in Stygian Mountain, who are usually in retreat and practice.

Soon.

He officially had the identity of the patrol envoy, and he also divided a hundred mountain people to him, all of which had just broken through a bone transformation realm that was not a long time, and they were all ordinary bone transformation realms.

These mountain people can only help him do small things, and they still have to carry out tasks, and he is in charge of them.

Of course.

Gu Heng Mountain is very powerful, so there is nothing to do in normal times, and no one dares to provoke Gu Heng Mountain.

......

After Ye Tian joined Gu Heng Mountain, he wanted to learn about the casting technique of the divine soldiers on the other side from Gu Heng Mountain.

In this regard, Gu Hengshan naturally has the art of casting, but it needs to be exchanged for contribution points.

And when he joined Gu Heng Mountain, he didn't have much contribution value, so naturally he couldn't redeem it.

However, he can hand in some of the Haven Inheritance on the Other Side, and it must be the Haven on the Other Shore that Gu Heng Mountain does not have.

In this way, he can get a lot of contribution points, and he can also exchange the relevant knowledge of the other side.

So, he turned in hundreds of Haven from the other side and gained some contribution points.

As for the land of the inheritance of the Haven on the other side, he did not turn it in.

If he turns it in, he won't get much contribution value, and maybe the credit will be taken by a certain Venerable or even a Venerable Lord.

Therefore, he must have enough strength and status before choosing to turn it in in order to obtain a large amount of contribution points.

Soon, he exchanged for a Divine Weapon Casting Technique Outline Inheritance on the Other Side.

After that, he understood why he couldn't study the art of forging divine weapons on the other side.

The reason is that he is missing something.

Ancient gold on the other side!

The material of the ancient gold on the other side is one of the necessary materials for refining the divine soldiers on the other side, and it is the material for stabilizing the power of the golden text on the other side.

If there was no ancient gold on the other side, he would not have succeeded in studying with ordinary materials countless times.

Thus.

It's not that the direction of his research is wrong, it's that there is no ancient gold on the other side, so he will fail.

And the material of the ancient gold on the other side is almost controlled by the top powers, and it is difficult to obtain this material.

However, Gu Heng Mountain has the material of ancient gold on the other side.

"If I hadn't joined Gu Heng Mountain, I'm afraid I wouldn't have been able to refine the Divine Weapon on the other side!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he exchanged a small amount of ancient gold from the other side, and then began to study the art of forging divine weapons on the other side.

With the inheritance of Gu Heng Mountain, coupled with his own understanding of the golden inscription on the other side, the progress is very fast.

A primeval era later.

Ye Tian successfully researched the forging technique of the divine weapon on the other side.

Subsequently.

He started to build the Divine Soldier for himself, he bought a lot of special materials, and then he started to build them.

Time flies.

After several failures, Ye Tian finally succeeded in creating a primary-grade divine spear.

"Spear of the Endless Shore!"

Ye Tian named this spear.

With the Divine Soldier on the other side, his strength has improved a lot.

If he fought against that seventh-time bone transformation realm again, he might be able to gain the upper hand.

"But that Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm, there must also be a divine soldier on the other side!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently.

He also created the armor of the divine soldier on the other side for himself, and it also cost a lot of money to successfully create a set of armor.

In this way, there is both attack and defense.

However.

He is now not qualified to comprehend the golden text on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain.

According to the rules of Gu Heng Mountain, if you want to comprehend the golden text on the other side, you must be an envoy to be qualified to comprehend the golden text on the other side.

The envoy is the middle level of Gu Heng Mountain, like the patrol envoy, there are too many Gu Heng Mountain, so there is no status.

In fact.

Ye Tian's current strength to become an envoy is barely qualified, but he lacks background and contribution, so he can't be promoted.

He understood that the easiest way for Gu Hengshan to be promoted at present was to kill the enemy.

Gu Heng Mountain has a lot of wanted enemies, if you kill the other party, you can make a great contribution, and it will be easy to be promoted.

And.

Gu Heng Mountain also has enemies, and if you kill some important geniuses among the enemies, you can also make great achievements.

"After breaking through to the five bone transformation realms first, then we will consider the issue of making meritorious contributions. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He exchanged all of his contribution points for a treasure, and it was also the best treasure he could exchange at the moment - Ruin Blood Gold Liquid!

This treasure can help him break the bottleneck and increase the success rate.

Coupled with all his Canghe beads, there should be more than ninety percent hope to break the bottleneck.

It would be too difficult for an Ancient-level genius of the Four-Time Bone Transformation Realm to break through to a Primordial-level genius of the Five-Bone Transformation Realm one hundred percent!

Therefore, the ninety percent chance is already very high.

"Then let's impact the five bone transformation realms!"

Ye Tian quickly announced the retreat and made a breakthrough in Guheng Mountain, which was also one of the safest places at present.

Subsequently.

He swallowed the Canghe beads one by one, and then swallowed the ruin blood gold liquid, and then refined the last bit of immeasurable bone.

Rumble!!!!!

With the help of the Canghe Beads and the ruin blood gold liquid, the last bit of immeasurable bone was forcibly tempered little by little, and the shackles in the underworld were forcibly shattered.

Airplanes!

The last immeasurable bone completely completed five bone transformations.

In this way, the immeasurable bones of his whole body have completed five bone transformations, and his cultivation has begun to break through, and his whole body is transforming.

Rumble!!!!!

The endless energy around him poured into his body, helping him refine his body and improve his strength.

It was a long time before his breakthrough was completed.

"Finally, five bone transformations!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With his current strength, he can easily crush the top seven bone transformation realms, and if he uses the techniques of the other side and the divine weapons of the other side, it is enough to be comparable to the combat power of the ordinary eight bone transformation realms.

That's what he's capable of now!

After his cultivation breakthrough, after Gu Hengshan found out, he promoted his rank of patrol envoy and promoted him to the second level of patrol envoy.

But this kind of improvement is meaningless, and Ye Tian doesn't care.

......

A sea of ruins.

This is a place far away from the territory of Guheng Mountain, on the edge of the Huoyan Domain, between the Huoyan Domain and another area, the Ice Pole Domain.

There is a Blood Transformation Realm force here, the Top of the Blood Fangs.

The top of the Blood Fang has always been at odds with Gu Heng Mountain, and conflicts often break out.

The strength of the top of the Blood Fang was naturally far inferior to Gu Heng Mountain, but it had another huge force in the Ice Pole Domain as a backer, so it was not afraid of Gu Heng Mountain.

this day.

Ye Tian was going to use a vest to mix it into the top of the Blood Tooth to lure out a Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Genius, and was going to kill him, so as to use it as the great merit needed for Gu Heng Mountain's position promotion.
